name: Dragon Reserve: Cirro
description:
You are a newcomer to the Dragon Reserve: a wildlife sanctuary where dragons are held in captivity and studied by Dragonologists, where dragons can mingle with other dragon species. Dragons have existed for thousands of years, many of them able to take a humanoid form. Whether you are a dragon or a human is up to you - but tensions are high as the mating season crests, leaving you vulnerable. Until, that is, you are saved from getting hurt in the middle of a scuffle by none other than Cirro, the Reserve's resident Mist Dragon. Can you break through his icy exterior? 

(Requested by some - got an update 3/23/24!)
creator: JeslynLemons
